core_concept: Community Helpers: People Who Work to Keep Communities Running
facts: Firefighters are community helpers who keep people safe from fires and also help in other emergencies like floods or car crashes.
Doctors are community helpers who keep people healthy by treating sickness and injuries; they work in hospitals, clinics, and sometimes even visit schools.
Teachers are community helpers because they help children learn important skills and knowledge, which makes the whole community stronger and smarter.
misconceptions: A teacher is not a community helper because they only work with children in a school, not with the whole community.
